data.title: Best Version Media wins Silver at 2025 Globee® Awards for Most Innovative Company of the Year (Business Services).
data.description: In Brookfield, Wisconsin, on October 2, 2025, Best Version Media has proudly received the title of Most Innovative Company of the Year in Business Services at the 17th Annual 2025 Globee® Awards for Innovation, also called the Golden Bridge Awards. This accolade highlights the company's commitment to advancing innovation in its sector.

data.title: Belmont Village Senior Living named one of Fortune's "25 Best Large Workplaces in Aging Services" for 2025.
data.description: Belmont Village Senior Living in Houston has been recognized as one of the top workplaces in the aging services industry, securing a spot on Fortune's prestigious list of the "25 Best Large Workplaces in Aging Services" for the year 2025. This accolade highlights Belmont Village's commitment to providing exceptional care for seniors and creating a positive work environment for its employees. The recognition reflects the dedication and hard work of the team at Belmont Village, showcasing their continued efforts to set high standards in the industry.
CEO transition at Signal Hill Equity Partners: James Johnson to be replaced by Ahmed Abdel-Saheb.

data.title: Saint-Gobain NA starts "Sustaining Futures, Raising Communities" to educate HS students on manufacturing careers.
data.description: In Philadelphia, Saint-Gobain North America unveiled the Sustaining Futures, Raising Communities program, aimed at fostering manufacturing workforce development for high school students. The goal is to showcase manufacturing as a lucrative career path. Partnering with local high schools, Saint-Gobain will offer a tailored curriculum to nurture local talent. This initiative seeks to raise awareness about the value of manufacturing careers and provide students with valuable skills for future employment opportunities.

data.title: Forbes Global Properties adds Flagship Real Estate Advisors in Rhode Island, boasting 8,500 transactions worth $3 billion.
data.description: Flagship Real Estate Advisors has joined Forbes Global Properties, an elite network of real estate brokerages, connecting clients to luxury properties worldwide. With a track record of over 8,500 successful transactions totaling $3 billion, the firm will now exclusively represent Forbes Global Properties in Rhode Island's top markets.

data.title: G11PRO electric scooter with 330-pound weight capacity offers unmatched inclusivity, safety, and value, setting new standard.
data.description: The recently launched G11PRO electric scooter in Los Angeles on October 2, 2025, promises superior comfort, control, and performance for a wide range of riders. With a weight capacity of 330 pounds, this scooter aims to make micromobility accessible to all. Additionally, it boasts the distinction of being the first in the industry to feature an inverted design.

data.title: Optiv earns CREST accreditation for penetration testing services, reinforcing commitment to industry standards. Key for financial institutions.
data.description: In Denver on October 2, 2025, Optiv, a prominent cyber advisory and solutions provider, revealed their attainment of CREST accreditation. This accreditation signifies Optiv's dedication to upholding top-notch industry standards, particularly in their work with financial institutions. This accomplishment highlights Optiv's commitment to excellence in cybersecurity practices.

Nigeria's National Emergency Management Agency (NEMA) on Thursday confirms confirmed that 10 people died, 24 passengers rescued, and 42 others are still missing following a boat accident in the Niger River. The boat was ferrying 80 people in total.

data.title: Blend360 launches BlendX, an AI Foundry to deliver advanced AI implementations on Snowflake AI Data Cloud. Speeds up development from months to days with actual code. NEW YORK, Oct. 2, 2025.
data.description: A Global AI Services company, Blend360, revealed their new offering, BlendX, in New York on Oct 2, 2025. This product boasts a pragmatic framework and tools incorporating reusable components, accelerators, and orchestration. It is designed to drastically reduce development time from months to days by utilizing actual code and components. BlendX aims to revolutionize the industry by streamlining processes and increasing efficiency, ultimately benefiting developers and users alike.

data.title: Ozinga Bros. partners with Spitch US Corp to improve CX and EX. Family-owned leader in concrete, logistics, and bulk materials.
data.description: In Chicago on October 2, 2025, Ozinga Bros., Inc., a family-owned business renowned for concrete, bulk materials, and logistics services, announced a collaboration with Spitch US Corp, the American branch of Spitch AG. This partnership aims to revamp operations through Conversational Agentic AI technology.

data.title: Vanguard launches Vanguard Emerging Markets ex-China ETF (VEXC) on Oct. 2, 2025, offering low-cost exposure to emerging markets equities while excluding Chinese securities.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, Vanguard introduced a new Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) called Vanguard Emerging Markets ex-China ETF (VEXC) in Valley Forge, Pennsylvania. This ETF provides cost-effective and diversified access to emerging markets equities, with a specific focus on excluding Chinese-based securities as classified by FTSE. The VEXC ETF aims to offer investors a comprehensive investment option while avoiding exposure to the Chinese market.

data.title: Collette Health buys Virtual Nursing Academy™ to enhance virtual care initiatives in healthcare. Oct. 2, 2025.
data.description: A virtual care platform called Collette Health, based in Noblesville, Indiana, is enhancing its services by introducing a top-tier virtual nursing education program. This platform stands out in the industry for combining virtual observation, virtual nursing, and workforce augmentation in a single offering. The announcement was made on October 2, 2025.

data.title: SoundHound AI recognized as a leader in IDC MarketScape for General-Purpose Conversational AI Platforms 2025 for its ability to handle complex requests, including multiple intents.
data.description: As per the report, the product received significant acclaim from customers for its capability to manage intricate requests, particularly those containing numerous intents.

data.title: Worthington Steel's Tempel Steel unveils Full Surface Bonding (FSB™) technology for motor core lamination bonding.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, Worthington Steel revealed that its subsidiary, Tempel Steel, has introduced Full Surface Bonding (FSB™), a groundbreaking method for bonding electrical steel laminations.

data.title: Capstone Green Energy gets order from Valparaiso Community Schools for 4 C65 Capstone microturbines, 2 at each campus.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Capstone Green Energy Holdings, Inc. (OTCQX: CGEH) revealed that Valparaiso High School and Benjamin Franklin Middle School from Valparaiso Community Schools (VCS) in Indiana have made a significant purchase. The educational institutions have placed an order for a total of four C65 Capstone microturbines. These turbines, with two units designated for each campus, will be integrated with Vergent Power Solutions controllers. This setup aims to provide prime power and combined heat and power (CHP) services, specifically for domestic hot water.

data.title: Global Unmanned Traffic Management Market set to reach $1.1 billion by 2030, growing at 33.9% CAGR from $106 million in 2022.
data.description: The unmanned traffic management (UTM) market is projected to reach USD 1,098 million by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 33.9% from USD 106 million in 2022. UTM aims to enable safe and efficient low-altitude airspace operations for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) by providing various services. This includes airspace design, dynamic configuration, geo-fencing, weather avoidance, congestion management, route planning, separation management, and contingency management. The aviation segment is expected to dominate the market from 2022 to 2030. Top companies in this market include Altitude Angel, Thales Group, AirMap, Airbus, and ANRA Technologies. Other applications of UTM include homeland security, agriculture, logistics, transportation, energy, construction, media, insurance, wildlife, forestry, and academic research. UTM systems are crucial for supporting the growth of the drone industry by facilitating safe drone integration into airspace and ensuring compliance with regulations and safety standards.
